notes.placeholder: Leave at the door, ring twice, no onions…

errors.addressLocationRequired: Pin your location: tap "Use current location" or pick a saved address with a marker.

alerts.conflictMessage: Your order is still being processed. Please wait a moment.
alerts.unauthorizedMessage: Please sign in again to complete checkout.
alerts.businessMessage: Some items in your cart are unavailable right now.
alerts.networkMessage: We couldn't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
alerts.genericMessage: Something went wrong placing your order. Please try again.

success.title: Order placed successfully!
